24hrs_prior.sms: This is a friendly reminder that your Automated Trucking Monthly Management fee is due tomorrow. Please login to your portal to pay.
24hrs_prior.subject: Automated Trucking Reminder – Monthly Management Fee Due Tomorrow
24hrs_prior.htmlBody:
This is a friendly reminder that your Monthly Management Fee is due tomorrow. Please log in to your portal to view and pay your invoice. If you require any assistance, please reach out directly to your Fleet Manager.

Thank you!
- Automated Trucking Team

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not respond to this email. If you require assistance, reach out directly to your Fleet Manager.

due_today.sms: Your monthly Management fee is due. Please login to your portal to view and pay your invoice.
due_today.subject: Reminder – Your Monthly Management Fee is Now Due
due_today.htmlBody:
This is a reminder that your management fee is now due. Please log in to your portal to view your invoice and schedule payment. If you require access or need assistance, please reach out to your Fleet Manager directly.

We thank you for being a valued partner with Automated Trucking.

Best,
- Automated Trucking Team

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not respond to this email. If you require assistance, reach out directly to your Fleet Manager.

24hrs_after.sms: Please login to your portal to pay your monthly management invoice to avoid any late fees or interruption in service.
24hrs_after.subject: Reminder: Past Due – Monthly Management Fee
24hrs_after.htmlBody:
Your Monthly Management Fee is now past due. Please log in to your portal and make a payment as soon as possible to avoid any late fees or service interruptions.

If you require assistance, please contact your Fleet Manager immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
- Automated Trucking Team

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not respond to this email. If you require assistance, reach out directly to your Fleet Manager.

48hrs_after.sms: Your Monthly Management Fee is now past due. Please log in to your portal and make a payment immediately to avoid late fees or service interruption.
48hrs_after.subject: Urgent: Past Due – Monthly Management Fee
48hrs_after.htmlBody:
Our records indicate that your Monthly Management Fee is now past due. Please log in to your portal to make a payment as soon as possible to avoid any late fees or service interruptions. If you have already made your payment, please disregard this notice.

If you require assistance, please contact your Fleet Manager immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
- Automated Trucking Team

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not respond to this email. If you require assistance, reach out directly to your Fleet Manager.

72hrs_after.sms: Reminder. You are now past due and a late fee will be applied to your management fee at the end of business day. Please login to your portal or reach out to your fleet manager for assistance.
72hrs_after.subject: Final Notice – Imminent Interruption *Past Due Monthly Management Fee
72hrs_after.htmlBody:
Your Monthly Management Fee remains unpaid, and a late fee may be applied to your balance. Immediate action is required to avoid further penalties or service interruptions.

Please log in to your portal to settle your balance or contact your Fleet Manager for assistance.

We appreciate your urgent attention to this matter.

Best,
- Automated Trucking Team

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not respond to this email. If you require assistance, reach out directly to your Fleet Manager.
